pokemon.metEgg: A mysterious Pokémon Egg that I was given on {date}.
pokemon.metFormat: We first met one another on {date}, and it was {location}!
pokemon.metLevel: At the time, this Pokémon was Lv. {level}.
pokemon.natureFormat: This Pokémon is pretty {nature} by nature.

remainingEggCycles.5OrFewer:
Sounds can be heard coming from inside!
This Egg will hatch soon!
remainingEggCycles.6To10:
It appears to move occasionally.
It may be close to hatching.
remainingEggCycles.11To40:
What Pokémon will hatch from this Egg?
It doesn't seem close to hatching.
remainingEggCycles.41OrMore: It looks as though this Egg will take a long time yet to hatch.
